seoTitle: Mumballup vs Mumberkine — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mumballup and Mumberkine. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mumballup and Mumberkine.
heading: Mumballup vs Mumberkine — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mumballup, Western Australia and Mumberkine, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mumberkine has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Mumballup (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mumballup or Mumberkine safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mumballup has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Mumberkine scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mumballup scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Mumberkine scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mumballup or Mumberkine?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mumberkine has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
